2605.06485.title: Litespark Inference on Consumer CPUs: Custom SIMD Kernels for Ternary Neural Networks
2605.06485.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed artificial intelligence, but their computational requirements remain prohibitive for most users. Standard inference demands expensive datacenter GPUs or cloud API access, leaving over one billion personal computers underutilized for AI workloads. Ternary models offer a path forward: their weights are constrained to {-1, 0, +1}, theoretically eliminating the need for floating-point multiplication. However, existing frameworks fail to exploit this structure, treating ternary models as dense floating-point networks. We address this gap with custom SIMD kernels that replace matrix multiplication with simple addition and subtraction operations, targeting the integer dot product instructions available on modern CPUs. Our implementation, Litespark-Inference, is pip-installable and integrates directly with Hugging-Face, achieving 9.2x faster time-to-first-token, 52x higher throughput, and 14x memory reduction compared to standard PyTorch inference on Apple Silicon, with similar speedups on Intel and AMD processors.
2605.06485.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已經改變了人工智慧，但它們的計算需求對於大多數用戶來說仍然是不可承受的。標準推理需要昂貴的數據中心GPU或雲API訪問，導致超過十億台個人電腦在AI工作負載中未被充分利用。三元模型提供了一條前進的道路：它們的權重被限制在{-1, 0, +1}，理論上消除了浮點乘法的需求。然而，現有的框架未能利用這一結構，將三元模型視為密集的浮點網絡。我們通過自定義的SIMD內核來填補這一空白，將矩陣乘法替換為簡單的加法和減法操作，針對現代CPU上可用的整數點積指令。我們的實現，Litespark-Inference，可以通過pip安裝，並與Hugging-Face直接集成，實現了比標準PyTorch推理在Apple Silicon上快9.2倍的首次令牌時間，吞吐量提高52倍，以及記憶體減少14倍，對於Intel和AMD處理器也有類似的加速效果。
2605.06485.author: Nii Osae Osae Dade et.al.
2605.06485.authors: Nii Osae Osae Dade, Tony Morri, Moinul Hossain Rahat, Sayandip Pal
